name: Death Note
author: opfromthestart
bootlegger: L is always an in-play character.
If L dies before getting a bingo, the Amnesiac's ability becomes stronger.
If the win condition of either team changes, this will be announced on day 1.

name: Amnesiac
ability: You do not know what your ability is. Each day, choose between asking a question or receiving one true and one false statement about your ability.

name: L
ability: Each day, privately guess what the Amnesiac's ability is: you learn how accurate you are. The Amnesiac learns what you guess the following night. If you get a bingo, you and the Amnesiac learn each other.
You do not know your character
